title:
Jannik Sinner defeats Felix Auger-Aliassime 6-3, 6-4 to reach the semifinals in Monte-Carlo. 

15 consecutive wins 

He will face Alexander Zverev in the semifinals of a 3rd consecutive Masters 1000.
author: José Morgado

title: Ruse with one of the biggest wins of her career in Linz!
author: José Morgado

title:
Zverev survives Fonseca in 2h41.

Awaits Sinner or Auger-Aliassime tomorrow.
author: José Morgado

title:
Fonseca forces a decider against Zverev, who got passive and a bit messy from a set and break up. 

It’s been a great and important week for João.
author: José Morgado
